title: L0 Agent Capability Types Registry
description: Bootstrap capability types for Layer 0 Agent Discovery. PR process for additions.

attestation.description: Can issue signed attestations about other agents or actions

delivery.description: Can deliver work products (code, data, reports) with verifiable receipts

scoring.description: Can evaluate and score other agents' work or trust profiles

settlement.description: Can execute financial settlement (escrow, payment, staking)

discovery.description: Can resolve agent_id to capabilities and trust vector endpoints

registration_rules.pr_process: Submit PR to capability-types.json with: name, description, version, verifiable_by, required_fields, example_ttl_seconds
